identifier.description: Raw identifier: ANI/phone (E.164 or national), email, or account number. Normalized server-side, so an unencoded '+' is tolerated.

found.description: False when the identifier resolves to no subscriber with a network.

eligible.description: True when there is an offer worth making. When false there is no suitable upgrade — do not invent one, and do not pressure the customer.

offer_id.description: Id of the offer. Pass it to order-action 'place' as target.

name.description: The offer's name, e.g. 'Northwind Mesh Pro'.

price_gbp.description: Monthly price in pounds. Always state this before ordering.

reason.description: Why this customer specifically would benefit, in plain English. Use this to explain the recommendation rather than making up a reason.
